entries.definition:
gh–th–w debris, scum, dry vegetation, wanting to vomit. Of
this root, only غُثَاء ghuthāʾ occurs once in the Qur’an.

غُثَاء ghuthāʾ [n.] scum, flotsam, dry vegetation, debris (87:4–
5) وَالَّذِي أَخْرَجَ الْمَرْعَى فَجَعَلَهُ غُثَاءً أَحْوَى who brought out the green
pasture, then turned it into [dark] debris.

5) وَالَّذِي أَخْرَجَ الْمَرْعَى فَجَعَلَهُ غُثَاءً أَحْوَى who brought out the green
